title: Morning tech and coffee
description: Hi neighbors! Let’s gather together, share ideas, and talk tech. Since a lot of us are in permanent WFH mode, we thought it would be nice to have a reason to leave our apartments in the morning and interact with real live friendly faces in our neighborhood. This is a host-free event with no specific […]

title: Korean for Beginners I
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Do you want to watch Korean dramas and movies without English captions? Do you want to say hello to your Korean neighbors or read signs in Korean? Or perhaps you dream of ordering Korean food in Korean? Then, this class is for you. You will be learning Korean words starting at the first class! Registration […]

title: Art Class (Adults)
description: The Jackson Heights Art Club offers several weekly adult classes in watercolor, oil, acrylic, pastel and drawing. Each student receives individual guidance and assistance from our professional instructors at the Club’s Studio. One may register or learn more about the classes by visiting their website or calling (718) 426-9821

title: Easy Chair Yoga for All! (English and Spanish)
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Yoga suave en silla para todos (en inglés y español) English: Chair yoga is a gentle way to achieve flexibility and relaxation as well as learn breathing techniques, practice meditation and improve health. Join our yoga instructor Paola M. Cardenas as we explore the benefits of this ancient method of exercise and relaxation. Spanish: Yoga […]

title: Hula Lessons with Verona
description: Hula Hooping & jump roping with Verona. Free and open to all. Sponsored by the 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition.

title: Make a Museum with ArchForKids
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Join us for a dynamic, hands-on learning experience with ArchForKids. You’ll explore how the built world around us affects who we are and how we live. In this workshop, you’ll design your own museum, possibly to showcase your collection of beanie babies, action figures, or video games! This program is funded by New York State […]

title: Innovation Stations: Songwriting Your Story
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Join us to create your own original songs! Through a mix of journaling, word games, and analysis of great music, we will create songs that reflect our personal experiences. This session will touch on the foundations of lyric and melody writing, with an emphasis on imagery and storytelling. Facilitator Mel will use her guitar to […]

title: ESL Conversation Club – For Beginners
description: Come practice English with us! Ven a practicar inglés con nosotros. Es gratis y para todos los niveles. Sponsored by the 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition.

title: Community Class: Flexibility + Focus, Yoga For Teens (bilingual Spanish + English)
description: Community Class with Jennifer Alarcon on Thursdays. This bilingual Spanish/English class is for all students age 11-15. No experience required! Email [email protected] for details.

title: Sunnyside Community Cultural Initiative
address: Bliss St, 46th St, Sunnyside, NY 11104, USA
description: Sunnyside Community Cultural Initiative is back! Enjoy live music at the plazas every Thursday starting April till September from local talent!

title: “Shine The Light” Weekly Visibility Action
description: Shine the Light with Jackson Heights Indivisible & The Beacon Jackson Heights Indivisible is proud to join The Beacon’s growing national movement of people of all faiths and backgrounds taking a stand against injustice through visible acts of solidarity. Every Thursday we gather in Jackson Heights for 30 minutes to shine a light for justice, […]

title: Our Laundry, Our Town with Alvin Eng In Conversation with Radha Vatsal
description: Join Alvin Eng discussing his book Our Laundry, Our Town My Chinese American Life from Flushing to the Downtown Stage and Beyond. Leading the conversation will be author and essayist, Radha Vatsal. With humor and grace, the memoir of a first-generation Chinese American in New York City. Our Laundry, Our Town is a memoir that decodes and processes […]

title: Wine Tasting (Free!)
address: 80-02 Northern Blvd, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: Sample a selection of French wines with Gil Avital from Elevation Wines. Chef Tony will create  French dinner specials to pair with the wines, and wines will be available for the glass or bottle for purchase. Make a reservation

title: 2026 Dancing with the Queens Stars Gala
description: A benefit evening bursting with Queens’ best in dance competition, music, art, and food that capture the spirit of Queensboro Dance Festival You’re invited to the most exciting night in Queens community!   Honoring: Adrienne Adams, City Council Speaker Emerita Rachel Cohen, LIC Real Estate Community Partner   Dancing with the Queens Stars is an […]

title: Salsa2026: Voces Latinas Fundraiser
description: Voces Latinas invites you to a night of salsa to support essential community needs that often fall outside of traditional funding, including clothing, meals, emergency supplies, and other basic items for clients and community members facing hardship.Enjoy an unforgettable night of salsa while supporting a meaningful cause.
